One dish that can be made with only onion and wheat flour is Onion Paratha.

Description:
Onion Paratha is a stuffed Indian flatbread made with a filling of sautéed onions and spices. It is a popular breakfast or brunch dish and is usually served with yogurt or pickle.

Ingredients:
- 2 cups wheat flour
- 1 cup finely chopped onion
- 1 tsp cumin seeds
- 1/4 tsp turmeric powder
- 1/2 tsp red chili powder
- Salt to taste
- Water as required
- Oil for cooking

Instructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the wheat flour, salt, and water to make a smooth dough. Cover and keep it aside for 10-15 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, heat oil in a pan and add the cumin seeds. Once they start to splutter, add the chopped onions and sauté till they turn translucent.
3. Add turmeric powder, red chili powder, and salt and mix well. Turn off the heat and allow the mixture to cool.
4. Now, divide the dough into equal portions and roll out each portion into a small circle.
5. Place a spoonful of the onion mixture in the center of the rolled-out dough. Bring the edges of the dough together to seal the stuffing and roll out again into a paratha.
6. Heat a flat pan or tawa on medium flame. Place the rolled-out paratha on the tawa and cook on both sides, drizzling oil around the edges, till it turns golden brown.
7. Serve hot with yogurt or pickle.

Tip:
To make the paratha more flavorful, you can add chopped coriander leaves or grated ginger to the onion filling. Additionally, you can also try using ghee instead of oil for a richer taste.

One dish that can be made with only onion and milk is Onion Soup.

Description:
Onion soup is a simple and comforting soup that is perfect for chilly days. This soup is made with sautéed onions and milk for a creamy texture. It can be served as a light meal or as a starter to a fancy dinner.

Ingredients:
- 4 cups thinly sliced onion
- 2 cups milk
- 1 tbsp butter
- 1 tbsp all-purpose flour
- 3 cups water
- Salt and black pepper to taste

Instructions:
1. Heat a pot over medium heat and add butter to it. Once it melts, add the sliced onions and sauté for 8-10 minutes until they turn translucent and slightly caramelized.
2. Sprinkle flour on the onions and stir well for about 1-2 minutes.
3. Add water slowly, stirring constantly until it's mixed well. Simmer it for about 10-12 minutes.
4. Remove the pot from heat and, using an immersion blender, blend the mixture until it's smooth.
5. Put the pot back on medium heat and add the milk to the blended mixture and continue stirring for about 2-3 minutes or until it's hot.
6. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
7. Serve hot with croutons or toasted bread.

Tip:
For a more flavorful soup, you can add a sprig of thyme or a bay leaf at the beginning of the cooking process. You can also try using vegetable stock instead of water to enhance the flavor of the soup.

One dish that can be made with only onion and cream is Caramelized Onion and Cream Pasta.

Description:
Caramelized Onion and Cream Pasta is a delicious and creamy pasta dish that is easy and quick to make. The sweetness of caramelized onions and the richness of cream make this pasta dish a favorite among many. This dish is perfect for dinner and can be enjoyed with a glass of wine.

Ingredients:
- 1 cup finely sliced onion
- 1 cup heavy cream
- 2 garlic cloves, minced
- 1 tbsp olive oil
- Salt and pepper to taste
- 8 oz spaghetti
- Parmesan cheese (optional)

Instructions:
1. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add onions and saute until golden brown, stirring occasionally for about 12-15 minutes.
2. Add minced garlic and cook for one more minute.
3. Lower the heat, add the heavy cream and stir constantly for about 2-3 minutes.
4. Boil spaghetti in salted water until al dente then drain and set aside.
5. Add cooked spaghetti to the skillet with the caramelized onion and cream mixture, toss it well and season with salt and pepper.
6. Serve immediately and top with grated Parmesan cheese if desired.

Tip:
To save time and add extra flavor, you can make the caramelized onion ahead of time and store it in the fridge for up to three days. When making the dish, simply reheat it in the skillet and add the cream.

One dish that can be made with only tomato and cucumber is Tomato and Cucumber Salad.

Description:
Tomato and Cucumber Salad is a fresh and healthy side dish that is perfect for summer. This salad is easy to make and can be served with any main course. The combination of juicy tomatoes and refreshing cucumbers makes this salad a favorite among many.

Ingredients:
- 2 tomatoes, diced
- 1 cucumber, diced
- 1/4 cup chopped red onion
- 2 tbsp olive oil
- 1 tbsp red wine vinegar
- Salt and black pepper to taste
- Fresh parsley (optional)

Instructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together diced tomato, cucumber, and red onion.
2. In a small bowl or jar, whisk together the olive oil and red wine vinegar.
3. Pour the dressing over the salad ingredients and toss well to coat.
4. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
5. Let the salad sit in the fridge for about 10-15 minutes to chill and allow the flavors to meld.
6. Serve chilled and garnish with fresh parsley if desired.

Tip:
For a little kick of spice, you can add a small amount of finely chopped jalapeno or red chili pepper to the salad. You can also experiment with different varieties of tomatoes and cucumbers to add more color and flavor to the salad. Additionally, you can add a sprinkle of crumbled feta cheese or toasted nuts for an extra texture.

One dish that can be made with only tomato and spinach is Tomato and Spinach Quesadilla.

Description:
The Tomato and Spinach Quesadilla is a healthy and delicious meal that can be made quickly and easily. The combination of the juicy tomato and the fresh spinach tastes amazing with the melted cheese in the crispy tortillas. This dish can be had for lunch or dinner or even as an appetizer.

Ingredients:
- 2 medium tomatoes, diced
- 2 cups fresh spinach
- 1 cup shredded cheese (cheddar or mozzarella)
- 4 flour tortillas
- 1 tbsp olive oil
- Salt and black pepper to taste

Instructions:
1. In a skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the diced tomatoes and cook for 3-4 minutes until they are slightly softened.
3. Add spinach to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes until wilted.
4. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
5. Remove from heat and set it aside.
6. Heat another skillet over medium heat.
7. Place a tortilla in the skillet, sprinkle 1/4 cup of shredded cheese evenly over the tortilla, and spread the tomato and spinach mixture over the cheese.
8. Top it with another tortilla and cook for 2-3 minutes or until the cheese is melted and the bottom of the tortilla is crisp.
9. Flip the quesadilla and cook for another 2-3 minutes until the other side is also crisp.
10. Remove from the skillet and cut into wedges.
11. Repeat the process for the remaining tortillas.

Tip:
For an extra flavor, you can add sliced mushrooms or chopped bell peppers to the tomato and spinach mixture. You can also use a mix of different cheeses to add more variety to the quesadillas. Additionally, you can serve this dish with guacamole or salsa on the side for a complete meal.
which dish can I make with only tomato,rice? and list out the description, ingredients, instructions and one tip

One dish that can be made with only tomato and rice is Tomato Rice.

Description:
Tomato Rice is a simple and tasty one-pot rice dish that is made with ripe tomatoes and spices. This versatile dish can be served as a side dish or as a main course with some raita or yogurt. It is perfect for a quick and easy lunch or dinner.

Ingredients:
- 1 cup long-grain rice
- 2 medium tomatoes, chopped
- 1 onion, chopped
- 2 garlic cloves, minced
- 1/2 tsp cumin powder
- 1/2 tsp coriander powder
- 1/4 tsp turmeric powder
- 2 cups water
- 2 tbsp oil
- Salt to taste

Instructions:
1. Rinse the rice thoroughly and soak it in water for 20-30 minutes.
2. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add chopped onions and sauté until golden brown.
3. Add minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
4. Add chopped tomatoes, cumin powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder, and salt. Mix well and cook until the tomatoes are soft and mushy (about 8-10 minutes).
5. Drain the rice and add it to the tomato mixture. Mix well.
6. Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and cover the pan. Cook until the rice is fully cooked and all the water is absorbed (about 20-25 minutes).
7. Once done, fluff up the rice with a fork.
8. Serve hot.

Tip:
For a variation, you can add chopped vegetables like peas, carrots, bell peppers, or even paneer to the tomato rice. You can also sprinkle some chopped fresh coriander leaves on top before serving for extra flavor.

One dish that can be made with only tomato and oats is Tomato Oats Upma.

Description:
Tomato Oats Upma is a healthy and delicious breakfast dish made with oats and tomatoes. This dish is rich in fiber, protein, and other essential nutrients and is easy to make. It is a perfect breakfast for those who are looking for a quick and healthy meal.

Ingredients:
- 1 cup rolled oats
- 2 medium tomatoes, finely chopped
- 1 onion, finely chopped
- 1 green chili, chopped
- 1/2 tsp mustard seeds
- 1/2 tsp urad dal
- 1/2 tsp chana dal
- 1/4 tsp turmeric powder
- Salt to taste
- 1 tbsp oil
- 2 cups water

Instructions:
1. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add mustard seeds, urad dal, and chana dal and let them splutter.
2. Add finely chopped onions, green chili, and turmeric powder. Sauté until onions become translucent.
3. Add chopped tomatoes, salt, and 1/4 cup water. Cook until the tomatoes are soft and mushy (about 5-7 minutes)
4. Add rolled oats and 2 cups of water to the pan. Mix well and let it cook for 5-7 minutes on medium-low heat.
5. Stir occasionally to make sure that the oats don't stick to the pan and the water is absorbed.
6. Once done, switch off the heat and let it stand for 2-3 minutes.
7. Serve hot.

Tip:
To add more flavor to the upma, you can add chopped vegetables like peas, carrots, or bell peppers. You can also add grated coconut or peanuts for extra texture. Additionally, you can garnish the upma with some fresh coriander leaves for added freshness.

One dish that can be made with only tomato and wheat flour is Tomato Paratha.

Description:
Tomato Paratha is a delicious and healthy flatbread made with wheat flour and tomato puree. This paratha is a perfect dish for breakfast, lunch, or dinner and can be served with any chutney or raita.

Ingredients:
- 2 cups wheat flour
- 2 medium tomatoes, pureed
- 1 green chili, finely chopped
- 1/2 tsp cumin powder
- 1/2 tsp coriander powder
- 1/4 tsp turmeric powder
- Salt to taste
- Water as required
- Oil for cooking

Instructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the wheat flour, salt, cumin powder, coriander powder, and turmeric powder.
2. Add tomato puree and finely chopped green chili to wheat flour mixture. Mix well.
3. Add water little by little and knead the dough to make a smooth dough.
4. Cover the dough and let it rest for 10-15 minutes.
5. After resting, divide the dough into equal portions.
6. Take one portion and roll it into a small circle.
7. Heat a tawa or pan on high heat.
8. Place the rolled-out paratha on the tawa or pan and cook on medium flame for 1-2 minutes on one side.
9. Flip it over to cook on the other side.
10. Spread some oil around the edges of the paratha.
11. Flip it again and let the paratha cook until it is golden brown on both sides.
12. Serve hot with any chutney or raita of your choice.

Tip:
To make the Tomato Paratha more flavorful, you can add a pinch of garam masala powder or dry mango powder (amchur) to the wheat flour mixture. You can also add finely chopped onions or grated paneer to the mixture for added texture. To make the paratha more nutritious, you can add some grated carrots or finely chopped spinach to the mixture.

One simple dish that can be made with only tomato and wheat flour is Tomato Roti.

Description:
Tomato Roti is a soft and delicious Indian flatbread that is made with wheat flour and tomato. This simple and healthy recipe is perfect for breakfast, lunch, or dinner and can be served with any curry or chutney.

Ingredients:

- 1 cup wheat flour
- 1 medium-sized tomato, finely chopped
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1/4 teaspoon turmeric powder
- 1/4 teaspoon red chili powder
- Water as required
- Oil

Instructions:

1. In a bowl, mix the wheat flour, salt, turmeric powder, and red chili powder.
2. Add the chopped tomato to the wheat flour mixture and mix it well until it forms into small crumbles.
3. Add water little by little and knead the dough until it's smooth and non-sticky.
4. Let the dough rest for 10-15 minutes.
5. Divide the dough into small portions and make them into a smooth ball.
6. Dust the ball with flour and roll out the roti.
7. Heat a pan and place the rolled-out roti on the pan.
8. Cook one side for about 30 seconds and then flip it over.
9. Cook the other side for about 30 seconds.
10. Apply a few drops of oil on the roti and flip it over again.
11. Apply oil on the other side and cook until golden brown.
12. Serve hot with any curry or chutney of your choice.

Tip:
To add more flavors, you can add some chopped coriander leaves or grated ginger to the dough. You can also use a mixture of wheat and gram flour (besan) for a crispy taste. Additionally, you can sprinkle some roasted cumin seeds on top of the tomato roti just before serving for extra flavor.

One simple dish that can be made with only tomato and milk is Creamy Tomato Soup.

Description:
Creamy Tomato Soup is a comforting and delicious soup made with rich and ripe tomatoes and milk. This soothing soup is perfect for chilly evenings and can be served as a light meal or as a side dish with any main course.

Ingredients:

- 4 medium-sized tomatoes, chopped
- 1 onion, chopped
- 2 cups of milk
- 2 garlic cloves, minced
- 2 tbsp butter
- 1 tsp sugar
- Salt and pepper to taste

Instructions:

1. Heat butter in a pan over medium heat. Once melted, add chopped onions and minced garlic, and saute until the onions become translucent.
2. Add chopped tomatoes, sugar, salt, and pepper, and mix well.
3. Cover and cook the tomato mixture on low heat for about 10 minutes or until the tomatoes become soft and pulpy.
4. Once done, remove from heat and let the mixture cool for a few minutes.
5. Then transfer it to the blender and blend it into a puree.
6. Put the puree back into the pan and add milk to it. Mix well.
7. Cook the soup on low heat for another 5-7 minutes or until the soup comes to a boil and the desired consistency is reached.
8. Add salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve hot with croutons or bread.

Tip:
To make the soup even creamier, you can add a 1/4 cup of cream instead of milk. Additionally, you can add some herbs like basil, thyme, or oregano to the soup to enhance the flavor. Finally, you can add some breadcrumbs or croutons on top of the soup for added crunch.

One simple dish that can be made with only tomato and milk is Tomato Rice Pudding.

Description:
Tomato Rice Pudding is a unique and delicious dessert that blends the sweetness of rice pudding with the tanginess of ripe tomatoes. This savory and sweet dish is perfect for those who like to experiment with different flavors and is a great way to use up leftover rice.

Ingredients
